title: Gridshare Device
description: A distributed energy resource managed by the Gridshare DERMS platform. Devices are identified by a synthId (synthetic identifier) and have a kind drawn from Gridshare's standard device taxonomy.

synthId.description: Synthetic identifier — the canonical ID used across telemetry, topology, and operation-mode endpoints.

deviceId.description: Manufacturer or installation-time device identifier (when distinct from synthId).

kind.description: Broad device category. Each kind defines a corresponding telemetry schema.

type.description: Finer-grained device type used in Partner topology and inventory endpoints.

siteId.description: Identifier of the site this device belongs to.

properties.description: Static, vendor-specific properties surfaced by the device.
